changes.reason: Adds a distinct high-value Apple Watch power and charging troubleshooting article below the 100 canonical article target, backed by current Apple Support sources.

queries: Apple Watch 无法充电 不开机 红色闪电
Apple Watch 充不进电 慢充 80% 优化充电
Apple Watch won't charge red lightning Slow Charger
Apple Watch charging cable icon magnetic charger
canonicalReview.notes: Existing Apple Watch canonical coverage is pairing and Voice Memos sync. Charging matches for AirPods and iPhone are device-specific and do not cover Apple Watch red lightning, magnetic charger alignment, watchOS Slow Charger, optimized charging, or WPT charger incompatibility.
